response.overview: The hero of the film is a 23-year-old guy who became an Olympic champion in breakdancing. The film, created in 2025, tells the story of Russian dancer Sergey Chernyshev's triumph at the 2018 Youth Olympic Games in Buenos Aires, where he became the first-ever champion in breakdancing. Sergey Chernyshev, a native of Voronezh, has been practicing breakdancing since childhood, with his father serving as his coach. His father instilled in him a fighting spirit and a unique perspective on life. In high school, the guy dreamed of going to drama school and acting in movies.
response.title: Battle. Sergey Chernyshev's Fight
